offer: For property managers handling 10-20 rental properties, inconsistent tracking of KPIs causes poor decision-making. We automate KPI tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of property management KPIs leads to poor decision-making.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try KPI dashboard for quick insights and user-friendly interface for easy data entry on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
